mapper.select: select TAG as 'tag', TIME as 'time', VALUE as 'value', FLAG from TB_HMI_CTR_TAG where FLAG = 0

select CTR_IDX, CTR_NM, OPT_IDX, TAG, TIME, VALUE, ANLY_CD, DATE_FORMAT(RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as 'RGSTR_TIME', DATE_FORMAT(UPDT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as 'UPDT_TIME', DATE_FORMAT(UPDT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as 'UPDT_TIME_M', FLAG from TB_HMI_CTR_TAG where FLAG = #{FLAG}
and ANLY_CD in ( 'RUN_STATUS' , 'STOP_STATUS')
and ANLY_CD in ( 'SYNC_STATUS' , 'IVK_STATUS')
and ANLY_CD = 'FREQ'
and ANLY_CD = 'CTR'
and ANLY_CD = 'VVK'
and ANLY_CD = 'STOP'
and ANLY_CD = 'START'
order by CTR_IDX ASC

select CTR_IDX, OPT_IDX, CTR_NM, TAG, TIME, VALUE, ANLY_CD, DATE_FORMAT(RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as 'RGSTR_TIME', DATE_FORMAT(UPDT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as 'UPDT_TIME', DATE_FORMAT(UPDT_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as 'UPDT_TIME_M', FLAG from TB_HMI_CTR_TAG where FLAG = 2 and ANLY_CD in ('RUN', 'STOP', 'FREQ') order by UPDT_TIME desc limit 0 ,1
mapper.update: update TB_HMI_CTR_TAG set FLAG = 3 where FLAG = 0 OR FLAG = 1
mapper.select: select cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_TYP, rd.TAGNAME, MAX(rd.ts) as 'TS', CASE WHEN rd.value = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END as value from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi, TB_RAWDATA rd where cppi.PMB_TAG = rd.TAGNAME and cppi.PUMP_GRP = #{PUMP_GRP} and rd.TS > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) and rd.TS <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) GROUP BY cppi.PUMP_IDX

SELECT cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_TYP, rd_pmb.TAGNAME AS PMB_TAGNAME, rd_spi.TAGNAME AS SPI_TAGNAME, MAX(rd_pmb.ts) AS PMB_TS, MAX(rd_spi.ts) AS SPI_TS, CASE WHEN rd_pmb.value = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END AS PUMP_YN, ROUND(rd_spi.value,0) as 'FREQ' FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA rd_pmb ON cppi.PMB_TAG = rd_pmb.TAGNAME AND rd_pmb.TS > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) AND rd_pmb.TS <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA rd_spi ON cppi.SPI_TAG = rd_spi.TAGNAME AND rd_spi.TS > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) AND rd_spi.TS <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) WHERE cppi.USE_YN = 1 GROUP BY cppi.PUMP_IDX, rd_pmb.TAGNAME, rd_spi.TAGNAME;

SELECT cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_TYP, rd_pmb.TAGNAME AS PMB_TAGNAME, rd_spi.TAGNAME AS SPI_TAGNAME, rd_pri.TAGNAME AS PRI_TAGNAME, MAX(rd_pmb.ts) AS PMB_TS, MAX(rd_spi.ts) AS SPI_TS, MAX(rd_pri.ts) AS PRI_TS, CASE WHEN rd_pmb.value = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END AS PUMP_YN, ROUND(rd_spi.value,0) as 'FREQ', ROUND(rd_pri.value, 2) AS 'PRI' FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA rd_pmb ON cppi.PMB_TAG = rd_pmb.TAGNAME AND rd_pmb.TS > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) AND rd_pmb.TS <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA rd_spi ON cppi.SPI_TAG = rd_spi.TAGNAME AND rd_spi.TS > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) AND rd_spi.TS <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA rd_pri ON cppi.PRI_T_TAG = rd_pri.TAGNAME AND rd_pri.TS > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) AND rd_pri.TS <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) WHERE cppi.USE_YN = 1 AND cppi.PUMP_IDX = #{PUMP_IDX} GROUP BY cppi.PUMP_IDX, rd_pmb.TAGNAME, rd_spi.TAGNAME, rd_pri.TAGNAME;

SELECT cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_TYP, cppi.CTR_AUTO_TAG, cppi.CTR_AUTO_STOP_TAG, cppi.CTR_MANUAL_TAG, cppi.CTR_AUTO_FREQ_TAG, cppi.CTR_SYNC_TAG, rd_pmb.TAGNAME AS PMB_TAGNAME, rd_spi.TAGNAME AS SPI_TAGNAME, MAX(rd_pmb.ts) AS PMB_TS, MAX(rd_spi.ts) AS SPI_TS, CASE WHEN rd_pmb.value = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END AS PUMP_YN, ROUND(rd_spi.value,0) as 'FREQ' FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA rd_pmb ON cppi.PMB_TAG = rd_pmb.TAGNAME AND rd_pmb.TS > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) AND rd_pmb.TS <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) LEFT JOIN TB_RAWDATA rd_spi ON cppi.SPI_TAG = rd_spi.TAGNAME AND rd_spi.TS > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) AND rd_spi.TS <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) WHERE cppi.USE_YN = 1 AND cppi.PUMP_TYP = 2 GROUP BY cppi.PUMP_IDX, rd_pmb.TAGNAME, rd_spi.TAGNAME;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_HMI_CTR_TAG(CTR_NM, OPT_IDX, TAG,TIME,VALUE,ANLY_CD, AI_STATUS, FLAG) VALUES (#{CTR_NM}, #{OPT_IDX}, #{TAG}, #{TIME}, #{VALUE}, #{ANLY_CD}, #{AI_STATUS}, #{FLAG})
mapper.select: SELECT tcpr.OPT_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_GRP as PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX as PUMP_GRP_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_IDX as PUMP_IDX, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_TYP as PUMP_TYP, IFNULL(tcpr.FREQ, 0) as FREQ, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_TAG, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_STOP_TAG, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_FREQ_TAG, tcppi.CTR_MANUAL_TAG, DATE_FORMAT(tcpr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME , CASE WHEN tcpr.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END as value, CASE WHEN tcpr.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END as 'PUMP_YN', '0' as 'FLAG', '' as RATE_CTGRY, '' as FLOW_CTR FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST tcpr join TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi on tcpr.PUMP_IDX = tcppi.PUMP_IDX where tcpr.OPT_IDX = #{OPT_IDX} AND tcpr.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF = 5 AND tcpr.FLAG = 0 ORDER BY tcpr.PUMP_IDX ASC

SELECT tcpr.OPT_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_GRP as PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX as PUMP_GRP_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_IDX as PUMP_IDX, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_TYP as PUMP_TYP, IFNULL(tcpr.FREQ, 0) as FREQ, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_TAG, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_STOP_TAG, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_FREQ_TAG, tcppi.CTR_MANUAL_TAG, DATE_FORMAT(tcpr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME , CASE WHEN tcpr.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END as value, CASE WHEN tcpr.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END as 'PUMP_YN', '1' as 'FLAG', RATE_CTGRY, FLOW_CTR FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY tcpr join TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi on tcpr.PUMP_IDX = tcppi.PUMP_IDX
and tcppi.PUMP_GRP = #{PUMP_GRP}
where 1=1
AND tcpr.RGSTR_TIME = (SELECT max(RGSTR_TIME) from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY where RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) AND PUMP_GRP = #{PUMP_GRP})
AND tcpr.RGSTR_TIME = (SELECT max(RGSTR_TIME) from TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY where RGSTR_TIME >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) )
AND tcpr.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF = 5 AND tcpr.FLAG = 0 ORDER BY tcpr.PUMP_IDX ASC

SELECT tcpr.OPT_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_GRP as PUMP_GRP, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_IDX as PUMP_GRP_IDX, tcpr.PUMP_IDX as PUMP_IDX, tcppi.PUMP_GRP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_NM, tcppi.PUMP_TYP as PUMP_TYP, IFNULL(tcpr.FREQ, 0) as FREQ, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_TAG, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_STOP_TAG, tcppi.CTR_AUTO_FREQ_TAG, tcppi.CTR_MANUAL_TAG, DATE_FORMAT(tcpr.RGSTR_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS PRDCT_TIME , CASE WHEN tcpr.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END as value, CASE WHEN tcpr.PUMP_YN = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END as 'PUMP_YN', '1' as 'FLAG', RATE_CTGRY, FLOW_CTR FROM TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY tcpr join TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF tcppi on tcpr.PUMP_IDX = tcppi.PUMP_IDX where tcpr.OPT_IDX = #{OPT_IDX} AND tcpr.PRDCT_TIME_DIFF = 5 AND tcpr.FLAG = 0 ORDER BY tcpr.PUMP_IDX ASC
mapper.update:
update
TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY
TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST
set FLAG = #{FLAG} where OPT_IDX = #{OPT_IDX}

update
TB_CTR_PUMPYN_INQUIRY
TB_CTR_PUMPYN_RST
set FLAG = 4 where FLAG = 1
mapper.select: select PUMP_IDX, PUMP_GRP, TNK_GRP_IDX, PUMP_GRP_IDX, PUMP_GRP_NM, PUMP_GRP_DSC, PUMP_NM, PUMP_TYP, PUMP_TYP_DSC, CTR_AUTO_TAG, CTR_AUTO_STOP_TAG, CTR_MANUAL_TAG, CTR_AUTO_FREQ_TAG, CTR_SYNC_TAG, EMS_MIN_WPP_TAG, EMS_MIN_WPJ_TAG, DUTY_H, DUTY_Q from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF where USE_YN = '1' order by PUMP_IDX
select PUMP_GRP from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF where USE_YN = '1' GROUP BY PUMP_GRP order by PUMP_GRP ASC
select TAG_GRP as 'PUMP_GRP' FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where FUNC_TYP = 'PumpStatus' and DISPLAY_ID='EMSPumpControl' and DEFAULT_VALUE = #{default_value}
select DEFAULT_VALUE as 'VALUE' FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where FUNC_TYP = 'PumpStatus' and DISPLAY_ID='EMSPumpControl' and TAG_GRP = #{PUMP_GRP]

SELECT rd.TAGNAME, rd.TS AS 'TS', rd.value AS 'value', CASE WHEN rd.value = 1 THEN "On" ELSE "Off" END AS 'STATUS' FROM TB_RAWDATA rd WHERE rd.TS = ( SELECT MAX(sub_rd.TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA sub_rd WHERE sub_rd.TAGNAME = '892-482-VVB-8025' AND sub_rd.TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) ) AND rd.TAGNAME='892-482-VVB-8025'

select cppi.PUMP_IDX, cppi.PUMP_GRP, cppi.PUMP_NM, cppi.PUMP_TYP, rd.TAGNAME, rd.ts as 'TS', rd.value as 'VALUE' from TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF cppi , TB_RAWDATA rd where rd.TAGNAME = cppi.SPI_TAG and cppi.CTR_AUTO_FREQ_TAG = #{TAG} and rd.TS = (SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) ) GROUP BY cppi.PUMP_IDX
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_EMS_ALR (ALR_TYP, ALR_TIME, AI_WEB, AI_SCADA, EMS_WEB, EMS_SCADA, PMS_WEB, PMS_SCADA, MSG, LINK, RGSTR_TIME, UPDT_TIME, FLAG) VALUES ( #{alr_typ}, #{nowDate}, "0", "0", "1", "1", "0", "0", #{msg}, #{link}, #{nowDate}, NULL, '1' );
mapper.select: SELECT TAG_GRP as PUMP_GRP, DEFAULT_VALUE as AI_STATUS FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = 'PumpStatus' ORDER BY PUMP_GRP
SELECT COALESCE(DEFAULT_VALUE, 0) as 'MODE' FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = 'TestMode'
SELECT COALESCE(DEFAULT_VALUE, 0) as 'MODE' FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = 'CtrTestMode'
SELECT COALESCE(DEFAULT_VALUE, 0) as 'MODE' FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = 'TPP'
SELECT rd.value FROM TB_RAWDATA rd WHERE rd.TS = (SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) ) AND rd.TAGNAME = #{tag}
SELECT COALESCE(DEFAULT_VALUE, 0) as 'MODE' FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = 'SN_MODE'
SELECT COALESCE(DEFAULT_VALUE, 10.8) as 'MODE' FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE FUNC_TYP = 'TPP_LIFE'
select COALESCE(VALUE, 0) as 'VALUE' from TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS = (SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) ) AND TAGNAME='565-340-IVB-4001'
select COALESCE(VALUE, 0) as 'VALUE' from TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS = (SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) ) AND TAGNAME= #{TAG}

select COUNT(VALUE) from TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS = (SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) ) AND TAGNAME in ( '565-340-IVK-4007', '565-340-IVK-4008', '565-340-IVK-4009', '565-340-IVK-4509' ) AND VALUE = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_WPP_TAG_CODE SET DEFAULT_VALUE = #{STATUS} WHERE TAG_GRP = #{PUMP_GRP} AND FUNC_TYP = 'PumpStatus'
